description: You are a GIS analyst supporting an international economic policy research team. Using gvSIG Desktop and the countries shapefile at /home/ga/gvsig_data/countries/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp, add a new numeric field named GDP_PCAP and populate it with GDP per capita calculated as (GDP_MD_EST × 1,000,000) ÷ POP_EST. Export the updated dataset, including all original fields and the new GDP_PCAP field, to /home/ga/gvsig_exports/countries_gdp_percapita.shp.
